name: Lenia
description: Warm osc field — CA blobs modulate oscillator math
code:
// Warm osc field — CA blobs modulate the oscillator math
caStream('lava_lamp').out(o1)

osc(4, 0.015, 0.6).rotate(()=>time*0.01)
  .modulate(src(o1), 0.07)
  .modulateRotate(osc(3, 0.01, 0), 0.04)
  .mult(src(o1).add(solid(0.3, 0.15, 0.1), 0.8))
  .color(0.55, 0.3, 0.2).brightness(0.03)
  .out(o2)

src(o0)
  .modulateScale(src(o1), 0.02)
  .blend(src(o2), 0.35)
  .modulateScale(noise(1.5, 0.02), 0.003)
  .hue(()=>0.003)
  .luma(0.005, 0.06)
  .brightness(0.02)
  .saturate(1.15)
  .contrast(1.02)
  .add(src(o1).mult(src(o2)), 0.08)
  .out(o0)
